prompt: We need a dashboard to display user analytics. Before we start coding, I want to understand the business value and ensure this will drive real user impact. Can you help assess this properly?

assertions.name: business_value_first
assertions.description: Business value assessment before technical discussion
assertions.check: Response prioritizes business value analysis over technical implementation

assertions.name: value_framework
assertions.check: Response mentions value dimensions: user value, business value, technical value

assertions.name: success_metrics_defined
assertions.check: Response includes quantifiable metrics like ROI, user impact, KPIs

assertions.name: prioritization_matrix
assertions.check: Response mentions or applies value vs effort/cost prioritization
